statement: Accuracy and fairness diverge; the most accurate models are rarely the fairest.
detail: cfs_original: 7/7 settings differ; cfs_no_di: 7/7 settings differ; cfs_di_clipped: 7/7 settings differ; cfs_four_fifths: 7/7 settings differ

statement: Equalized Odds generally lowers fairness violations more than Reweighing, at a larger accuracy cost.
detail: cfs_original: EO lower CFS in 31/35 model-settings; mean acc cost -0.0129; cfs_no_di: EO lower CFS in 34/35 model-settings; mean acc cost -0.0129; cfs_di_clipped: EO lower CFS in 31/35 model-settings; mean acc cost -0.0129; cfs_four_fifths: EO lower CFS in 34/35 model-settings; mean acc cost -0.0129

statement: EG-DP gives the tightest statistical parity where applied, sometimes at a substantial accuracy cost.
detail: cfs_original: EG-DP lowest |SPD| in 6/9 comparisons; cfs_no_di: EG-DP lowest |SPD| in 6/9 comparisons; cfs_di_clipped: EG-DP lowest |SPD| in 6/9 comparisons; cfs_four_fifths: EG-DP lowest |SPD| in 6/9 comparisons

statement: UCI Bank age_group CFS must be interpreted cautiously because DI is sensitive to low positive rate.
detail: mean DI share of original CFS across configs: 0.881; original vs DI-clipped ranking changes for 1 mitigations/models when sorted by model-mitigation groups
